github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text:
Follow Conventional Commits: '<type>(${1:scope}): ${2:short summary in imperative mood (max 50 chars)>}'

Body: Use a maximum of 3-4 bullet points. Focus strictly on architectural 'WHY' and 'IMPACT' (e.g., performance, type safety, DX). Avoid listing specific files or trivial implementation details. End each point with a contextually appropriate emoji. Keep the total body length under 300 characters for high scannability.

Footer: Include 'Closes #issue' or 'BREAKING CHANGE:' if applicable.
